sources.title: A Christmas Dream | 2025 Christmas Movie | Exclusive Hallmark Movie | Lorenzo Pozzan
sources.description:
Ashley travels to Lake Como with her mom, to sell her grandparents family ranch before the holidays. Once reunited with the horses and childhood memories, she is reluctant to sell.When handsome young ranch guy shows up, interested in buying and turning the place into a riding school, sparks fly, saving the ranch and stealing her heart.

2024.  Stars: Lorenzo Pozzan, Sarah Jane Duncan, Leila Grey

metadata.Plot: Ashley and her mother Susan are two New Yorkers coming to Italy to sell the grandparents ranch. Once there Ashley falls in love with one of the potential buyers and decides to spend her life with him.
metadata.Actors: Sarah Jane Duncan, Leila Grey, Lorenzo Pozzan
